name: PAYMENT_PENDING
description: Wave docs: order awaiting payment confirmation.

name: PENDING
description: Wave docs: order created on Wave, awaiting ERP acceptance.

name: ACCEPTED
description: Wave docs: ERP has accepted the order; push ACCEPTED to Wave.

name: UNDER_PICKING
description: Wave docs: pick list created in ERP; warehouse is picking.

name: INVOICING
description: Wave docs: order is being invoiced.

name: PICKUP_READY
description: Wave docs: order is ready for customer pickup at the store.

name: UNDER_DELIVERY
description: Wave docs: order is in transit to the customer.

name: COMPLETED
description: Wave docs: order closed; payment received and goods delivered.

name: CANCELLED
description: Wave docs: order cancelled (by customer, merchant, or system).
